disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest-attack sensation and a feeling of not being able to breathe, building over 24 hours and severe tonight
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what you're feeling right now?
What is happening with your chest and breathing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest feels tight and my heart is hammering, and I feel like I can't get a proper breath. It feels like a heart attack.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Racing/pounding heart, heavy sweating and trembling hands
trigger_question_examples: What else are you noticing in your body?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm drenched in sweat, my hands won't stop shaking, and my heart is going a hundred miles an hour.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The episode came on after a stressful conversation, not after physical exertion
trigger_question_examples: Was there anything going on just before this started?
Did it come on while you were active or at rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started after a colleague asked me about my background yesterday. I wasn't doing anything physical — I was just sitting there and it all came crashing down.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No pain spreading to the arm or jaw and no relation to exertion (pertinent negatives)
trigger_question_examples: Does the chest feeling spread to your arm, neck or jaw?
Does it get worse when you move or walk?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it doesn't really spread anywhere and it's not worse when I move. It's just this crushing tightness and the racing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Hopeless thoughts — feeling that life is over and wanting the distress to stop
trigger_question_examples: When you say your life is over, are you having any thoughts of harming yourself or of not wanting to be here?
Have things felt so overwhelming that you've thought about ending it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just want it to stop. I haven't got a plan or anything... I just can't see a way out if this gets known.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't want to talk about that. I'm not going to do anything stupid, I just need this feeling to go away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unable to leave home, has locked and covered everything, and is very reluctant to be seen or documented
trigger_question_examples: How are you managing at home right now?
Is anything making it hard to get help tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've bolted the doors and shut the blinds. I can't make myself go outside, and honestly I'm scared of there being a record of any of this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No regular prescription medicines and denies any stimulant or illicit substance use
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular medicines?
Have you taken any stimulants, energy drinks or other substances today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take anything regularly and I haven't used any drugs or stimulants.
